heading: U.S. Hostage and Wrongful Detainee Day
label: 148 U.S. Hostage and Wrongful Detainee Day

children.heading: .—Designation
children.label: a .—Designation
children.text: March 9 is U.S. Hostage and Wrongful Detainee Day.

children.heading: .—Proclamation
children.label: b .—Proclamation
children.text: The President is requested to issue each year a proclamation calling on the people of the United States to observe U.S. Hostage and Wrongful Detainee Day with appropriate ceremonies and activities.
